title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Brûlée, Unknown person #11, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Advance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: whoosh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Honey...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pretzel.!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: in a nearby area...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gahhh, I can't do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The battle between master cracker and that "straw hat" is so intense, that even being in the vicinity of them is too much for us to handle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: , WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wouldn't shed a single tear if every last one of you died a miserable death!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a A AAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Commander cracker" or his mother, the yonko "Big Mom"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Which one do you think is scarier?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You beat them both hands down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: Inside BroLee's "Mirror World"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Listen, Carrot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just came up with an ingenious plan, so you must show me respect and address me as "brother chopper" from now on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Sure thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So what is this amazing plan, Bropper?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Brop- Per?!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: It seems as though this mirror world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is connected to every single mirror that exists on the face of whole cake island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So instead of trying to escape this place ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now that you mention it... yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be in our best interest to actually use Bru(lee's power against her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: capital of whole cake island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: pedro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: pedro...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we've managed to sneak inside its body... but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: worry not, now that we've made it this far, we've pretty much succeeded in our infuriating mission!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This Biscuit soldier moves around with the aid of big mom's powers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Once it's finished patrolling the streets,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll return to the castle to be stored for the remainder of the day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we have to do now is wait for that moment and seize it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The next morning, inside the "whole cake chateau"

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Good morning, Mama! Today,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will be welcoming the Vinsmokes into our castle for a meet and greet of sorts...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are the preparations for the wedding cake coming along?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with the customary "Exchange of Engagement gifts"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's on schedule for to- morrow.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been a day now... what is the status update on our pests?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Today will pretty much be their final chance of seeing their comrade.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Surely, you jest... once you assigned commander cracker to that task, they lost whatever hope they had of putting up a fight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, once "Black leg" steps foot inside this castle,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if by some miracle they managed to get here unscathed, there odds of meeting him face to face drop to 0.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, both the tea party and the wedding itself will be taking place right here, inside this very castle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That vermin... was all that big talk and bravado just for show?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Either way, I've been told that the Vinsmoke children have not all arrived yet.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Germa kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, I have an update on that! Apparently, a short while ago, the last of them have just arrived at the port.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 50 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
